member.name: T:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Error
member.summary: Represents an immutable, transport-independent application error.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Error.#ctor(System.String,System.String,LearningPortal.Shared.Results.ErrorType)
member.summary: Represents an immutable, transport-independent application error.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Error.Code
member.summary: The stable, machine-readable error code.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Error.Message
member.summary: The safe, human-readable error message.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Error.ErrorType
member.summary: The category of the error.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors
member.summary: Provides reusable, consistently coded application errors.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.Validation
member.summary: Provides reusable validation errors.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.Validation.Failed(System.String)
member.summary: Creates an error containing one or more validation failure messages.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.Validation.Required(System.String)
member.summary: Creates an error indicating that a required field has no value.
member.param: The field name used in the error code and message.
member.returns: A validation error for the required field.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.Validation.Invalid(System.String)
member.summary: Creates an error indicating that a field value is invalid.
member.param: The field name used in the error code and message.
member.returns: A validation error for the invalid field.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.Common
member.summary: Provides reusable errors shared across application features.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.Common.NotFound(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Creates an error indicating that an entity could not be found.
member.param: The entity type or display name.
member.returns: A not-found error for the requested entity.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.Common.Duplicate(System.String)
member.summary: Creates an error indicating that an entity already exists.
member.param: The entity type or display name.
member.returns: A conflict error for the duplicate entity.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.Common.Failure(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates an expected operation failure.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.Common.Unexpected
member.summary: Creates an unexpected technical failure without exposing implementation details.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.Authentication
member.summary: Provides reusable authentication errors.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.Authentication.Unauthorized
member.summary: Creates an error indicating that authentication is required or has failed.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.Authentication.InvalidCredentials
member.summary: Creates an error for invalid credentials without identifying which credential failed.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.Authentication.InvalidRefreshToken
member.summary: Creates an error for a refresh token that is unknown or malformed.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.Authentication.RefreshTokenExpired
member.summary: Creates an error for an expired refresh token.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.Authentication.RefreshTokenRevoked
member.summary: Creates an error for an explicitly revoked refresh token.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.Authentication.RefreshTokenReused
member.summary: Creates an error when a rotated refresh token is presented again.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.Authentication.UserLocked
member.summary: Creates an error for a user currently locked by ASP.NET Identity.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.Authentication.UserUnavailable
member.summary: Creates an error for a disabled or otherwise unavailable user.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.Authorization
member.summary: Provides reusable authorization errors.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.Authorization.Forbidden
member.summary: Creates an error indicating that the caller lacks permission for an operation.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.UserManagement
member.summary: Provides reusable administrator user-management errors.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.UserManagement.UserNotFound(System.Guid)
member.summary: Creates an error for an unknown user identifier.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.UserManagement.InvalidRole
member.summary: Creates an error for a role outside the application allowlist.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.UserManagement.UpdateFailed
member.summary: Creates a safe failure for an Identity user update that could not be completed.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.UserManagement.RoleAssignmentFailed
member.summary: Creates a safe failure for an Identity role assignment that could not be completed.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.CourseManagement
member.summary: Provides course-management errors.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.CourseManagement.NotFound(System.Guid)
member.summary: Creates an error for an unknown course.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.CourseManagement.DuplicateSlug
member.summary: Creates an error for a duplicate normalized slug.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.CourseManagement.InvalidInstructor
member.summary: Creates an error for an invalid assigned instructor.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.CourseManagement.InvalidState(System.String)
member.summary: Creates an error for an invalid lifecycle operation.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.CourseManagement.ConcurrencyConflict
member.summary: Creates an optimistic-concurrency conflict.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.LessonManagement
member.summary: Provides lesson-management errors.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.LessonManagement.NotFound(System.Guid)
member.summary: Creates a missing lesson error.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.LessonManagement.DuplicateOrder
member.summary: Creates a duplicate order error.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.LessonManagement.InvalidState(System.String)
member.summary: Creates an invalid lifecycle error.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.LessonManagement.InvalidOrder
member.summary: Creates an invalid order error.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.LessonManagement.ConcurrencyConflict
member.summary: Creates a concurrency conflict error.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.LessonManagement.InvalidContent(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a lesson content validation error.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.Enrollment
member.summary: Provides enrollment errors.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.Enrollment.NotFound(System.Guid)
member.summary: Creates a missing enrollment error.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.Enrollment.Duplicate
member.summary: Creates a duplicate active enrollment error.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.Enrollment.CourseNotPublished
member.summary: Creates an unpublished-course error.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.Enrollment.InvalidState
member.summary: Creates an invalid transition error.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Errors.Enrollment.ConcurrencyConflict
member.summary: Creates an optimistic concurrency conflict.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.ErrorType
member.summary: Defines transport-independent categories for application errors.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.ErrorType.Validation
member.summary: Indicates that one or more input values are invalid.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.ErrorType.NotFound
member.summary: Indicates that a requested resource does not exist.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.ErrorType.Conflict
member.summary: Indicates that the operation conflicts with existing state.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.ErrorType.Unauthorized
member.summary: Indicates that authentication is required or has failed.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.ErrorType.Forbidden
member.summary: Indicates that the authenticated caller is not permitted to perform the operation.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.ErrorType.Failure
member.summary: Indicates an expected application or business operation failure.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.ErrorType.Unexpected
member.summary: Indicates an unexpected technical failure.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Result
member.summary: Represents the immutable outcome of an operation that does not return a value.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Result.IsSuccess
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the operation succeeded.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Result.IsFailure
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the operation failed.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Result.Error
member.summary: Gets the operation error when the operation failed; otherwise, .

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Result.Success
member.summary: Creates a successful result.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Result.Failure(LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Error)
member.summary: Creates a failed result containing the specified error.
member.param: The error that caused the operation to fail.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Result`1
member.summary: Represents the immutable outcome of an operation that returns a value on success.
member.typeparam: The type of the successful value.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Result`1.Value
member.summary: Gets the successful operation value.
member.exception: Thrown when accessed on a failed result.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Result`1.Error
member.summary: Gets the operation error when the operation failed; otherwise, .

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Result`1.IsSuccess
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the operation succeeded.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Result`1.IsFailure
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the operation failed.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Result`1.Success(`0)
member.summary: Creates a successful result containing the specified value.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Result`1.Failure(LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Error)
member.summary: Creates a failed result containing the specified error.
member.param: The error that caused the operation to fail.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Shared.UserManagement.PagedUsersResponse.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{LearningPortal.Shared.UserManagement.UserResponse},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Shared.UserManagement.PagedUsersResponse.Items

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Shared.UserManagement.PagedUsersResponse.PageNumber
member.summary: The one-based page number.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Shared.UserManagement.PagedUsersResponse.PageSize
member.summary: The requested page size.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Shared.UserManagement.PagedUsersResponse.TotalCount
member.summary: The total matching user count.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Shared.UserManagement.PagedUsersResponse.TotalPages
member.summary: The total number of available pages.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Shared.UserManagement.UserResponse
member.summary: Represents the administrator-safe projection of an Identity user.

member.summary: Represents the administrator-safe projection of an Identity user.

member.summary: The user identifier.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Shared.UserManagement.UserResponse.Email
member.summary: The user's email address.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Shared.UserManagement.UserResponse.DisplayName
member.summary: The user's display name.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Shared.UserManagement.UserResponse.IsEnabled
member.summary: Whether the user may authenticate.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Shared.UserManagement.UserResponse.Roles
member.summary: The user's distinct assigned roles.
